form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last on March 29 over 366m at Capalaba behind Cashed Up Rhi beaten 14 lengths (20.61) in a Grade 5. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 457m in 25.49 last start, beating Summer's Edition. Consistent performer from this box. Top chance on best form.
